Book Appointment
✨ You Matter Here

Your Mental Health
Your Journey
Your Safe Space

At Mind Grace Clinic, everything revolves around you. Whether you're navigating anxiety, seeking support for your child, or finding balance again—Dr. Anita Sharma and our compassionate team are here.

Book Your Session See How It Works

Care Designed Around You

Personalized, evidence-based support for every stage of your journey

Psychiatric Care

Expert diagnosis and treatment for anxiety, depression, bipolar disorder, OCD, and more—with you at the center.

Learn More

Child Development

Autism assessment, ADHD support, speech therapy, and special education tailored to your child's unique needs.

Explore AASHA

Counseling

Individual, couple, and family therapy in a safe, non-judgmental space where your voice is heard.

Meet Our Therapists

Wellness Tools

Free guided breathing, butterfly tapping, fractal hypnosis, and other self-care resources for daily use.

Try Free Tools

Clinic Experience

A warm, private, and comfortable environment designed to make every visit feel like coming home.

See Our Space

Visit Us

Conveniently located in Greater Noida with easy parking and accessible facilities for all.

Get Directions
